revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初八]][[zh:六月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初八]][[zh:六月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初八]][[zh:六月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初八]][[zh:六月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 8|qq=June 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|July 15|en|July 15|qid=Q2686|lt=July 15|1=July 15}}) – {{ill|Hirotsu Ryurō|en|Hirotsu Ryurō|qid=Q1620306|lt=Hirotsuyu Yanagi|1=Hirotsu Ryurō}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1928|en|1928|qid=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|907|en|907|qid=Q24163|lt=907|1=907}} {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Atsuko|ja|藤原温子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Atsuko|1=Fujiwara no Onshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8765805}}, a consort of Emperor Uda (born {{ill|872|en|872|qid=Q30368|lt=872|1=872}}). * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}} 4th year (leap June) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1216|en|1216|qid=Q5373|lt=1216|1=1216}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) – {{ill|Kamo no Chōmei|en|Kamo no Chōmei|qid=Q291329|lt=Kamo Chōmei|1=Kamo no Chōmei}}, a waka poet and essayist (born {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) – {{ill|Kurozumi Sōchū|ja|黒住宗忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurozumi Sōchū|1=Kurozumi Munetada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678013}}, the 8th lord of the Matsushiro Domain (born {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|7|6|9|5|8|7|6|0608|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
